author: Naval Ravikant
text: Play long-term games with long-term people. All returns in life, whether in wealth, relationships, or knowledge, come from compound interest.

author: Albert Einstein
text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
Want to know who rules over you? Look at who you are not allowed to criticize.
author: Voltaire
Naval Ravikant
text: Retirement is when you stop sacrificing today for an imaginary tomorrow. When today is complete, in and of itself, you’re retired.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: The best revenge is massive success.
author: Frank Sinatra

text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
author: Alan Kay

text: Deleted code is debugged code.
author: Jeff Sickel

text: Earn with your mind, not your time.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: Reading a book isn’t a race — the better the book, the more slowly it should be absorbed.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: The only true test of intelligence is if you get what you want out of life.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: A taste of freedom can make you unemployable.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: The smarter you get, the slower you read.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: To the experts, what looks like hard work from the outside, is play from the inside.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: Escape competition through authenticity.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: Learn to sell. Learn to build. If you can do both, you will be unstoppable.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: You want to be rich and anonymous, not poor and famous.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese proverb

text: Those who can, do; those who can’t, teach.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: A focused fool can accomplish more than a distracted genius.
author: Alex Hormozi

text: I hear and I forget. I see and I remember. I do and I understand.
author: Confucius

text: Those who know don’t talk. Those who talk don’t know.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Become so good they can’t ignore you.
author: Cal Newport

text: When you arise in the morning, think of what a precious privilege it is to be alive.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Hard choices, easy life. Easy choices, hard life.
author: Jerzy Gregorek

text: If you want to be successful, surround yourself with people who are more successful than you.
author: Alex Hormozi

text: To avoid criticism: do nothing, say nothing, and be nothing.
author: Elbert Hubbard

text: Be curious. Read widely. Try new things.
author: Aaron Swartz

text: You can't compete against someone who is there just to have fun.
author: Peter Steinberger, on OpenClaw
